title: Abarema campestris
taxonomy: Abarema campestris belongs to the family Fabaceae. It is a species of flowering plant in the genus Abarema. The genus Abarema is a part of the subfamily Caesalpinioideae. Abarema campestris is native to Central and South America. This classification is based on botanical studies and the APG IV plant classification system.
